summary: Preflight identifies #93893 as the repairable canonical contributor PR for the Docker sandbox duplicate mount bug and #93854 as security-sensitive route-only context. I could not inspect the local checkout because every sandboxed shell command failed before execution with `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`, so implementation and proof are blocked until the applicator/executor can re-fetch current main and run the focused validation.

actions.reason: Route only the exact security-sensitive linked issue to central OpenClaw security handling.
The contributor PR is the canonical repair branch, but this worker cannot verify or edit the checkout in the current sandbox.
A complete repair plan exists, but the executor must perform the actual checkout verification and branch repair.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #93893 by confirming current main can still produce duplicate Docker mount destinations when user-provided Docker binds overlap internal read-only workspace skill mounts, then keep the narrow fix on the contributor branch so overlapping internal skill mounts are not appended twice while preserving sandbox mount security boundaries.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(sandbox): avoid duplicate Docker skill mounts
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- repairs contributor PR #93893 on its existing branch
- prevents Docker sandbox startup from receiving duplicate mount destinations when user binds overlap internal read-only workspace skill mounts
- preserves the existing reserved-path validation and sandbox security boundary

## Credit
This repair carries forward the fix from @xydttsw in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93893.

## Verification
- pnpm check:changed
- focused sandbox Docker mount regression selected from the checkout
- Codex /review
likely_files: focused colocated sandbox Docker mount regression test selected from the checkout
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @xydttsw and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93893.
Do not comment on or close #93854 in this lane because it is security-sensitive route-only context.

fix_actions.reason: worker result status blocked is not executable
